observation: Shipped creator-post-check-coverage-route: QA evidence coverage audit (bun creator:post-check-coverage). Discovers all 11 examples/creator-*.html surfaces, maps to expected .artifacts/creator-*-qa.md evidence files (with known mapping for non-standard naming: poster drops 'surface', capsule excluded), verifies QA files exist and contain real browser evidence markers. Found 1 gap: creator-prompt-dna-adapter has no QA evidence (reported as non-fatal WARN). Wired into regression orchestrator after example-check-coverage. Updated example-check-coverage infraSkip to include post-check-coverage. Promoted to retained_routes (now 23 retained routes). Selected creator-regression-duration-route as next winner. Added creator-prompt-dna-qa-route as fresh candidate (directly addresses the gap found by this check). All baseline gates pass.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, keep scripts and docs in sync, reduce noise in regression output, catch orphan files, uncovered check gaps, missing QA evidence, and performance regressions

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report — improving autonomous Darwin signal-to-noise ratio.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-filter.ts that wraps the regression orchestrator, filters out known pre-existing bun-types lint errors from output, and reports only actionable failures
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean, no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise into TypeScript compilation output during bun run.

candidates.mutation: Add a regression duration tracker (bun creator:regression-duration) that records per-check timing baselines from the regression orchestrator output, compares against stored baselines, and flags any check that regresses beyond a threshold (e.g., 2x baseline) — catching slow performance regressions in Darwin checks before they accumulate.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-duration.ts that parses the regression orchestrator's per-check timing output, stores baselines in examples/creator-regression-duration-baseline.json, and reports PASS/REGRESSION per check
candidates.risk: Baseline file must be committed to track history. First run always creates baseline (never fails). Timing variance from CI/OS makes thresholds tricky — may need running-average approach. Check count changes (new checks added) require baseline reset — auto-detect and warn.

candidates.mutation: Generate QA evidence for the prompt DNA adapter surface (creator-prompt-dna-adapter.html). Currently the only retained surface without a .artifacts/creator-prompt-dna-adapter-qa.md file — exposed by the new creator:post-check-coverage audit. Generate real browser DOM evidence matching the standardized vision QA template pattern used across all other surfaces.
candidates.phenotype: .artifacts/creator-prompt-dna-adapter-qa.md with real browser_console DOM evidence, creator:prompt-dna-check updated to generate QA artifact, post-check-coverage gap closed.
candidates.risk: Prompt DNA adapter is an image/video model adapter — visual phenotypes are prompt strings, not rendered media. QA evidence must document the adapter contract, canvas compliance, and boundary safety rather than visual output. Provider vision API may be unavailable (DOM fallback). Must not commit raw generated media.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface
unified regression orchestrator (24-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts)
Per-surface health check (dynamically discovers all creator-*.html surfaces)

WORKFLOW_INDEX gate health check (cross-references all 32 gates against package.json scripts, validates existence and execution — 32/32 PASS)
Example surface check coverage audit (discovers all examples/creator-*.html surfaces, maps to expected check scripts, validates existence in package.json — 11/11 surfaces covered, 0 orphans)
Post-check QA evidence coverage audit (10/10 expected surfaces with QA, 1 known gap: prompt-dna-adapter)

retention: Promoted creator-post-check-coverage-route from candidates[] selected winner to retained_routes[] (shipped: 10/11 surfaces audited, 9/10 expected QA files present, 1 known gap: prompt-dna-adapter). Wired into regression orchestrator after example-check-coverage. Updated example-check-coverage infraSkip set to prevent false orphan. Selected creator-regression-duration-route as next winner.
